name: ResultStatus
title: Result Status (2.8.1 - 1.2.0)
description: HL7-defined code system of concepts which specify a status of results for an order.  Used in HL7 Version 2.x messaging in the OBR segment.

property.description: version when was this code introduced
version when was this code deprecated
A code that indicates the status of the concept. Typical values are active, experimental, deprecated, and retired
A string that provides additional detail pertinent to the use or understanding of the concept

concept.display: Some, but not all, results available
concept.definition: Some, but not all, results available

designation.value: einige, aber nicht alle Ergebnisse verfügbar

concept.display: Final results; results stored and verified.  Can only be changed with a corrected result.
concept.definition: Final results; results stored and verified.  Can only be changed with a corrected result.

concept.display: No results available; specimen received, procedure incomplete
concept.definition: No results available; specimen received, procedure incomplete

designation.value: Keine Ergebnisse - Probe liegt vor, Untersuchung unvollständig

concept.display: Order received; specimen not yet received
concept.definition: Order received; specimen not yet received

designation.value: Auftrag erhalten - Probe steht noch aus

concept.display: Preliminary: A verified early result is available, final results not yet obtained
concept.definition: Preliminary: A verified early result is available, final results not yet obtained

designation.value: Vorläufig - Validiertes Zwischenergebnis liegt vor, aber noch keine endgültigen
Ergebnisse gespeichert, aber noch nicht validiert

concept.display: No results available; procedure scheduled, but not done
concept.definition: No results available; procedure scheduled, but not done

designation.value: Keine Ergebnisse - Untersuchung eingeplant, aber noch nicht durchgeführt

concept.display: No order on record for this test.  (Used only on queries)
concept.definition: No order on record for this test.  (Used only on queries)

concept.display: No record of this patient. (Used only on queries)
concept.definition: No record of this patient. (Used only on queries)
